title: Fertilizer Drone
description:
The DJI Agras T30 is one of the most advanced agricultural drones, designed specifically for large-scale fertilizer and pesticide spraying.
         Payload Capacity: 30 liters (fertilizer, pesticides, etc.)
         Flight Time: Up to 20 minutes per charge, depending on the payload
         Spraying System: high-precision spraying system with 4 nozzles
         Intelligent Features:  T30 has advanced AI-powered spraying technology
         Coverage Area:  40 acres per day 
         Applications: Fertilizer application, pesticide spraying, crop monitoring, and field mapping.

title: Cultivator

         Weed Removal: Helps in removing weeds and unwanted plants. 
         Fertilizer Mixing: Mixes fertilizers into the soil for uniform distribution.
         Soil Leveling: Smoothens the soil surface for sowing seeds.
         Time Saving: Increases efficiency compared to manual labor.

title: Weed Remover
description:
Weed Control: Removes unwanted plants that compete with crops for nutrients.
        Soil Protection: Helps prevent soil erosion by controlling invasive weeds.
        Time Saving: Reduces manual labor by efficiently removing weeds.
        Prevents Crop Damage: Minimizes the risk of weeds damaging crops.
        Improves Crop Yield: Ensures crops get enough nutrients and water.

title: Post Hole Digger
description:
Efficient Digging: Designed to quickly dig precise, uniform holes.
     Manual or Powered: Available in both hand-operated and motorized versions.
     Adjustable Size: Typically adjustable to create holes of different diameters.
     Time-Saving: Faster than digging with a shovel or spade, especially for large projects.
     Used for Construction: Commonly used in fencing, landscaping, and utility installations

title: Threshing Machine
description:
Grain Separation: Separates grains from stalks, husks, and straw.
     Increased Efficiency: Faster and more efficient than manual threshing.
     Improved Crop Yield: Helps maximize the amount of grain collected.
     Time Saving: Reduces the time required for threshing large volumes of crops.
     Versatile: Works with various crops like wheat, rice, and barley..

title: Plough
description:
A chisel plow is a primary tillage practice that tills the soil, leaving a rough surface without causing soil inversion.
    A common tool to get deep tillage (prepared land) with limited soil disruption

title: Baler
description:
Compresses crops into rectangular or round bales.
     Efficiency: Saves time and labor compared to manual baling.
     Types: Includes round balers and square balers.
     Easy Transport: Bales are easier to move and store.
     Used for: Hay, straw, silage, and other crop residue.
